title: Pseudo FTS5 virtual table helper functions for file path mapping and search
purpose: Provides utilities to manage and query a pseudo-full-text search table that maps file paths to content for efficient searching and indexing.
module_context: Exports functions to ensure table setup, upsert file content, delete file entries, clear all entries, and perform searches using FTS5 with sanitized queries and result mapping.

steps.content: Check if the database has already been initialized with FTS tables.
IF not initialized, create the pseudo_fts_rowid table and its index.
Mark the database as initialized to prevent duplicate setup.

methods.name: resolveRowid
methods.normalized_params: (db: Database, file_path: string, createIfMissing: boolean): number | null

steps.content: Query the pseudo_fts_rowid table for an existing rowid associated with the file path.
IF a rowid is found, return it immediately.
IF no rowid is found and creation is not requested, return null.
ELSE insert a new row into the pseudo_fts_rowid table with the file path.
Return the newly inserted rowid.

methods.name: upsertFileFts
methods.normalized_params: (db: Database, row: { file_path: string; title: string; purpose: string; step_content: string; method_names: string }): void

steps.content: Ensure the FTS mapping table is initialized for the database.
Begin a database transaction to ensure atomicity.
Resolve or create the rowid for the file path.
Delete any existing FTS entry for the resolved rowid.
Insert or update the FTS entry with the provided content.
Commit the transaction to finalize changes.
Ensure the FTS mapping table is initialized for the database.
Begin a database transaction to ensure atomicity.
Resolve the rowid for the file path.
IF no rowid is found, exit without further action.
Delete the FTS entry associated with the rowid.
Delete the rowid mapping from the pseudo_fts_rowid table.
Commit the transaction to finalize changes.
Ensure the FTS mapping table is initialized for the database.
Begin a database transaction to ensure atomicity.
Delete all entries from the pseudo_fts table.
Delete all entries from the pseudo_fts_rowid table.
Commit the transaction to finalize changes.
Trim whitespace from the raw query string.
IF the trimmed string is empty, return an empty string.
IF the query contains special FTS5 characters, return it as-is.
ELSE wrap the query in double quotes and escape any existing double quotes.

methods.name: runFtsSelect
methods.normalized_params: (db: Database, matchExpr: string, limit: number): FtsSearchResult[]

steps.content: Execute a query against the pseudo_fts table using the match expression.
Join with the pseudo_fts_rowid table to retrieve file paths.
Calculate a rank using the bm25 function for relevance scoring.
Generate snippets for title and purpose fields using the snippet function.
IF the query fails, log a warning and return an empty result set.
Map the query results to the expected FtsSearchResult format.

methods.name: searchFts
methods.normalized_params: (db: Database, query: string, limit?: number): FtsSearchResult[]

steps.content: Ensure the FTS mapping table is initialized for the database.
Sanitize the raw query string for FTS5 compatibility.
IF the sanitized query is empty, return an empty result set.
Execute the sanitized query against the FTS table with the specified limit.
Return the search results.

methods.name: findFunctionFts
methods.normalized_params: (db: Database, name: string, limit?: number): FtsSearchResult[]

steps.content: Ensure the FTS mapping table is initialized for the database.
Trim whitespace from the function name.
IF the trimmed name is empty, return an empty result set.
Escape any double quotes in the function name.
Construct a match expression targeting the method_names field.
Execute the match expression against the FTS table with the specified limit.
Return the search results.
